data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.technical_spec: Utilizes HTTPS and TLS protocols for data in transit.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Ensures proper authentication and access control.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates OAuth 2.0 for secure user authentication.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Protects against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Uses scalable cloud-based defenses to absorb attack traffic.

data.title: Vulnerability Testing
data.description: Regular vulnerability assessments to detect and mitigate risks.
data.technical_spec: Performs automated and manual security audits.

data.title: Security Operations Center
data.description: Monitors and responds to threats continuously.
data.technical_spec: Operates a 24/7 SOC for real-time threat analysis and incident response.
